reasoning: Koren, your primary limiter is poor lactate clearance and aerobic base, evidenced by the 9.3% drop in your power curve and your last ride HR of 147.2 bpm at 66% FTP. To tackle the lactate clearance issue, we need to simulate race conditions you'll encounter on the Alpine Loop, focusing on sustained efforts at threshold and above.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Alternate 6 min at 209-218W and 3 min at 242-249W, repeat 4 times

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
